docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-16-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-16-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF JOHANA MENDIETA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JORGE MARTINEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, JORGE HEARING SET FOR OCT-17-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER GRANTING DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT. (SEE ATTACHED EXHIBIT A) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR FULL DETAILS)

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY JORGE MARTINEZ IS GRANTED. THE DEFENDANT WHO APPEAREDD BEFORE THE COURT IS NOT THE SAME PERSON INVOLVED IN THE ACCIDENT DESPITE THE FACT THAT THEY SHARE NAMES AND DRIVER LICENSE NUMBERS. THE DEFENDANT WHO APPEARED IN COURT IS INSURED BY AAA, BUT PLAINTIFF(S) ATTORNEY, DAVID P KASHANI, RECEIVED PAYMENT FROM STATE FARM TO COVER THE ACCIDENT. THE COURT RULES THIS PAYMENT CAN BE USED. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF MAY RECOMMEND TO HIS CLIENT THAT SHE APPLY TO THE COURT FOR A JUDGMENT AGAINST THE CORRECT DEFENDANT, IF NECESSARY. (SEE ATTACHED EXHIBIT A)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MENDIETA, JOHANA AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, JORGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-16-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-16-2019 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-17-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-17-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF JOHANA MENDIETA ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPERTER, PEIDAD BLANCO, IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JORGE MARTINEZ ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPERTER, SHANNON RAINTREE, IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF IS ASKED IF THE DEFENDANT WHO IS PRESENT IN COURT WAS THE DRIVER WHO HIT HER VEHICLE. PLAINTIFF STATES THAT SHE CAN NOT DETERMINE IF DEFENDANT WHO IS PRESENT WAS THE SAME DRIVER WHO HIT HER VEHICLE DUE TO THE TIME OF THE ACCIDENT, WHICH WAS VERY EARLY IN THE MORNING AT AROUND 1:00 AM. IN OPEN COURT, PLANTIFFS ATTORNEY DAVID KASHANI IS CALLED TO DISCUSS A CHECK PAYMENT RECEIVED BY STATE FARM INSURANCE TO HIS CLIENT JOHANA MENDIETA FOR THE AMOUNT OF $9,020, WHICH IS BEING HELD BY PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY. DEFENDANT PROVIDES TO THE COURT PROOF OF INSRUANCE THROUGH AAA (HIS CURRENT INSURANCE CARRIER) AND STATES THAT HE HAS NEVER CARRIED INSURANCE THROUGH STATE FARM. THE ISSUE OF PROPER SERVICE IS DISCUSSED AND IS DETERMINED THAT THE SUBSTITUTE SERVICE IS VALID BUT THAT DEFENDANT DID NOT RECEIVE THE CLAIM THAT WAS SUB-SERVED. COURT DETERMINES THAT DEFENDANT WHO IS PRESENT IN COURT IS NOT THE PARTY ON THE COPY OF THE LICENSE PROVIDED BY PLAINTIFF, ALTHOUGH THE INFORMATION ON THE COPY OF THE DRIVERS LICENCE IS THE SAME AS TO THE NAME, DL# AND DOB AS THE CURRENT LICENSE PROVIDED TO THE COURT FOR REVIEW IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL IS INFORMED BY THE COURT THAT SUFFICEINT EVIDENCE HAS BEEN PROVIDED TO SHOW THAT JUDGMENT IS AGAINST THE INCORRECT PARTY AND IS INCLINED TO VACATE THE JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: MOTION GRANTED ORDER MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 10/17/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $134.00 - SERVED MAY-20-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, JORGE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MENDIETA, JOHANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, JORGE $8,820.00 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,020.00, COSTS REDUCED DUE TO EXCESSIVE SERVICE AMOUNT. (*PER ORDER VACATING JUDGMENT FILED OCT-17-2019) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
